chunks.text: HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Present: Justice Jawad Akbar Sarwana Civil Revision Application No.194 of 2024 Applicant No.1: Province of Sindh Applicant No.2: Secretary Local Government, Sindh Secretariat, Karachi Applicant No.3: Deputy Commissioner, Hyderabad Applicant No.4: Superintendent Engineer Works & Services Department, Shahbaz Building, Hyderabad Applicant No.5: Executive Engineer, Highway Division, Shahbaz Building, Hyderabad Applicant No.6: Assistant Engineer, Highway Sub-Division Hyderabad (Rural), Hyderabad Through Mr.Wali Muhammad Jamari, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh Respondent No.1: M/S Roomasa Engineering Works, through Attorney Dad Muhammad Shah, in person Respondent No.2: Oil & Gas, Development Company Ltd. Nemo Respondent No.3: Project Director Development Package. Nemo Respondent No.4: Deputy Project Director Development Package. Nemo. Date of hearing: 17.11.2025, 02.12.2025 & 11.12.2025 Date of decision: 02.01.2026 O R D E R JAWAD AKBAR SARWANA, J.: For reasons to be recorded, the appeal is allowed, and the judgment and decree passed by the trial Court (which was upheld by the appellate forum) are set aside, and the suit of respondent No. 1/plaintiff is dismissed. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
